content.en:
Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian and Hayes Heavenly Ancestor gradually found some Void Mother Liquid, and they gained a lot.

Thundered!!!!

In the distance, those Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors and those Void Demon Worms were fighting together, and the number of Void Demon Worms was very large, and the battle was very tragic.

"Go, avoid them!"

Hayes Tianzu Road.

But no matter how they avoided it, they would still encounter other Void Demon Worms.

Thus, combat injuries were inevitable.

Another period of time has passed.

At this time, the pressure of Mia's bitter sea suddenly became terrifying.

"Gotta go!" Hayes Heavenly Ancestor reminded: "The calm period of Mia's bitter sea is about to pass, if you continue to stay here, you will find death!"

The Void Mother Liquor is indeed important, but they can't find death for the Void Mother Liquor!

Whew!!

The Celestial Ancestors of Hayes fled quickly, and in a short time rushed out of the Miyaku Sea.

......

"Let's distribute the Void Mother Liquor!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor took out all of the Void Mother Liquor.

"386 drops of Void Mother Liquor!"

According to the eight digits, each primeval-level genius is evenly distributed, accurate to the point of every drop.

Each primeval-level genius could be assigned a little more than forty-eight drops of Void Mother Liquid.

After the distribution, one primordial-level genius left.

"Forty-eight drops of Void Mother Liquid is good, but there is absolutely no way to help me break through to the Seven Blood Transformation Realm, Hayes Heavenly Ancestor is afraid that they have been here many times, and I haven't seen them break through!

Therefore, he would not be satisfied with this Void Mother Liquor.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian entered Mia's bitter sea again.

Of course, he didn't go to slowly find the Void Mother Liquid by himself, it was death.

Once the calm period of Mia's Bitter Sea has passed, he will definitely not be able to survive if he enters Mia's Bitter Sea again, and he will soon be killed by those Void Demon Worms, without the slightest power to resist.

When he entered the Mia Bitter Sea this time, he just copied the body of a six-time Blood Transformation Realm Void Demon Worm, and as a Void Demon Worm, he searched for the Void Mother Liquid in the Mia Bitter Sea, and when the time came, the real body copied the body and sent it out.

This method can only be done by him, and other primordial-level geniuses or even the Nine Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors can't do it.

Soon, a six-time Blood Transformation Realm Void Demon Worm was copied.

Then, Ye Tian's true body copy body immediately left the Mia Sea of Bitterness.

......

The calm period of Mia's bitter sea has passed, and those Heavenly Ancestors have all left here, and none of them dare to stay in Mia's bitter sea.

"The calm period has passed, and I don't feel the slightest feeling of my Void Demon Worm's copy body!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

I have to say that the Void Demon Worm was not affected at all in the Mia Bitter Sea, even if the Mia Bitter Sea wind hit the heavens and the earth, blowing all over the depths of time and space here, making this place extremely chaotic, it still couldn't affect him.

He wandered around here in the form of a Void Demon Worm's body, looking for the Void Mother Liquid.

Soon, he found a bit of Void Mother Liquor, and then took it into his belly and continued to search for other Void Mother Liquor.

Two drops of Void Mother Liquor!

Three drops of Void Mother Liquor!

As time passed, Ye Tian found more and more Void Mother Liquor.

Moreover, the Void Mother Liquid is of little use to the Void Worm, so no Void Worm collects this thing.

Time flies, and the Void Mother Liquor collected by Ye Tian has reached tens of thousands of drops.

"There are so many Void Mother Liquor, if Hayes Heavenly Ancestor sees it, I'm afraid they will have to go crazy!"

Ye Tian thought so.

He was going to transport away these Void Mother Liquids first and bring them back to cultivate.

Mia bitter overseas.

Ye Tian's true body copied his body and came here and forcibly broke into the Mia Sea of Bitterness.

Rumble!!!

The terrifying suppressive power came, making his replica body barely exert much strength here, and any Void Demon Worm could kill him.

Swish!

Ye Tian's Void Demon Worm Replica Body came over, transferring 10,000 drops of Void Mother Liquid to his True Body Replica Body.

Then, his true copy body escaped from Mia's bitter sea as fast as he could.

"It's out!"

Then, he returned to Cosmos.

......

Inside the Universal City.

Ye Tian took out a drop of Void Mother Liquid, and then began to swallow and refine.

Rumble!!!

The energy of the Void Mother Liquid refined his heart, although the effect was not as good as the primeval root marrow, but it also had some effects, and if there were enough of them, it could definitely quench the heart to the extreme of the six blood transformation realms.

So, in the following years, he refined the Void Mother Liquid on his body drop by drop.

As drops of Void Mother Liquid were refined by him, his heart grew stronger and stronger.

Unconsciously, 10,000 drops of Void Mother Liquid were consumed by him.

"I didn't expect that 10,000 drops of Void Mother Liquid had been refined, and it hadn't reached the extreme of the Six Blood Transformation Realms. Hayes Heavenly Ancestor and they are also preparing to spend endless years, entering the Mia Sea of Bitterness again and again to collect the Void Mother Liquid. For them, one day they will have enough Void Mother Liquid to quench their hearts to the extreme of the Six Blood Transformation Realms!" Ye Tian guessed.

"Continue to Mia's Bitter Sea!"

Ye Tian passed over again.

Because the Void Demon Worm has found tens of thousands of drops of Void Mother Liquor in its duplicate body, but there are not many Void Mother Liquor left, and if you continue to look for it, it is estimated that you can only find one or two thousand more drops of Void Mother Liquor.

But so much Void Mother Liquid should be enough for him to refine alone!

"After this batch of Void Mother Liquid is consumed, Mia Kuhai wants to give birth to more Void Mother Liquid, and it will take a long time to accumulate it slowly, but it will not accumulate a lot of Void Mother Liquid. The next time Hays Heavenly Ancestor and them enter the Mia Bitter Sea, they may not be able to find a few drops of Void Mother Liquid!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Soon, he received tens of thousands of drops of Void Mother Liquor back, and then continued to refine the Void Mother Liquid to quench his heart.

This time, after consuming 26,000 drops of Void Mother Liquid again, he finally refined his heart to the extreme of the six Blood Transformation Realms.

"I have encountered a bottleneck again, and I need to break the bottleneck before I can become a Seven Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian no longer refined the Void Mother Liquid for the time being, but found a way to break this bottleneck.

Abrupt.

He thought of the Void Worms.

Those Void Demon Worms are not too powerful, but when he enters Mia's Sea of Suffering, he can't defeat any Void Demon Worm, using the suppressive power of the Void Demon Worm, after countless battles, maybe he can break through the bottleneck.

Of course, the premise is not to let a large number of Void Demon Worms besiege him, and let a few Void Demon Worms attack him, so as to not only give pressure, but also not kill his replica body in a short time.

"I can only let the Void Demon Worm copy the body and mix in the position of the boss first!"

Ye Tian decided.
